name: input
title: BTInput
description: Material M3 outlined-style text input with floating label. Foundation of the btech input family. Supports label chips (leftLabel/rightLabel), all text types, password toggle, multiline, char count, prefix/suffix, clearable, and Flutter Form validator integration.
